subject: Dyslipidemia
object: elevated levels of low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C)
source_sentence: Dyslipidemia is characterized by elevated levels of low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) or triglycerides, or reduced levels of high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (HDL-C).

subject: Dyslipidemia
source_sentence: Dyslipidemia is characterized by elevated levels of low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) or triglycerides, or reduced levels of high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (HDL-C).

subject: Dyslipidemia
object: reduced levels of high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (HDL-C)
source_sentence: Dyslipidemia is characterized by elevated levels of low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C) or triglycerides, or reduced levels of high-density lipoprotein cholesterol (HDL-C).

subject: Elevated LDL-C
source_sentence: Elevated LDL-C is a major risk factor for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.

subject: atorvastatin
source_sentence: Statins such as atorvastatin and rosuvastatin lower LDL-C by inhibiting HMG-CoA reductase, the rate-limiting enzyme in cholesterol synthesis.

subject: rosuvastatin
source_sentence: Statins such as atorvastatin and rosuvastatin lower LDL-C by inhibiting HMG-CoA reductase, the rate-limiting enzyme in cholesterol synthesis.

subject: HMG-CoA reductase

subject: HMG-CoA reductase
source_sentence: Statins such as atorvastatin and rosuvastatin lower LDL-C by inhibiting HMG-CoA reductase, the rate-limiting enzyme in cholesterol synthesis.

subject: high-intensity statin therapy
source_sentence: High-intensity statin therapy can reduce LDL-C by 50% or more.

subject: HDL-C
source_sentence: HDL-C is involved in reverse cholesterol transport, carrying cholesterol from peripheral tissues to the liver for excretion.

subject: HDL-C
source_sentence: HDL-C is involved in reverse cholesterol transport, carrying cholesterol from peripheral tissues to the liver for excretion.

subject: HDL-C
source_sentence: HDL-C is involved in reverse cholesterol transport, carrying cholesterol from peripheral tissues to the liver for excretion.

subject: evolocumab
source_sentence: PCSK9 inhibitors such as evolocumab and alirocumab lower LDL-C by preventing degradation of LDL receptors on hepatocytes.

subject: alirocumab
source_sentence: PCSK9 inhibitors such as evolocumab and alirocumab lower LDL-C by preventing degradation of LDL receptors on hepatocytes.

subject: PCSK9 inhibitors
object: degradation of LDL receptors on hepatocytes
source_sentence: PCSK9 inhibitors such as evolocumab and alirocumab lower LDL-C by preventing degradation of LDL receptors on hepatocytes.

subject: Ezetimibe
source_sentence: Ezetimibe reduces intestinal cholesterol absorption and is used as add-on therapy to statins.

subject: Ezetimibe
source_sentence: Ezetimibe reduces intestinal cholesterol absorption and is used as add-on therapy to statins.

subject: LDL receptor gene
source_sentence: Familial hypercholesterolemia is an inherited disorder caused by mutations in the LDL receptor gene, leading to severely elevated LDL-C from birth.

subject: Familial hypercholesterolemia
source_sentence: Familial hypercholesterolemia is an inherited disorder caused by mutations in the LDL receptor gene, leading to severely elevated LDL-C from birth.

subject: 10-year atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk score
source_sentence: The 10-year atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk score is used to guide statin initiation in primary prevention.

subject: Statin
source_sentence: Statin therapy is recommended for all patients with established atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease regardless of baseline LDL-C.

subject: statin therapy
source_sentence: Myopathy is the most clinically significant adverse effect of statin therapy.

subject: Elevated triglycerides
source_sentence: Elevated triglycerides are associated with increased risk of pancreatitis when levels exceed 500 mg/dL.

subject: fenofibrate
source_sentence: Fibrates such as fenofibrate lower triglycerides by activating peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor alpha.

subject: fenofibrate
source_sentence: Fibrates such as fenofibrate lower triglycerides by activating peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor alpha.

subject: Omega-3 fatty acids
source_sentence: Omega-3 fatty acids reduce triglyceride levels and may be used as adjunctive therapy in severe hypertriglyceridemia.

subject: Omega-3 fatty acids
source_sentence: Omega-3 fatty acids reduce triglyceride levels and may be used as adjunctive therapy in severe hypertriglyceridemia.

subject: Lipoprotein(a)
source_sentence: Lipoprotein(a) is an independent genetic risk factor for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease that is not reduced by statins.

subject: statins
source_sentence: Lipoprotein(a) is an independent genetic risk factor for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease that is not reduced by statins.

subject: Apolipoprotein B
source_sentence: Apolipoprotein B is a measure of the total number of atherogenic lipoprotein particles and may be a better predictor of cardiovascular risk than LDL-C alone.

subject: Apolipoprotein B
source_sentence: Apolipoprotein B is a measure of the total number of atherogenic lipoprotein particles and may be a better predictor of cardiovascular risk than LDL-C alone.

subject: dietary changes
source_sentence: Lifestyle modifications including dietary changes, exercise, and weight loss are first-line interventions for dyslipidemia.

subject: exercise
source_sentence: Lifestyle modifications including dietary changes, exercise, and weight loss are first-line interventions for dyslipidemia.

subject: weight loss
source_sentence: Lifestyle modifications including dietary changes, exercise, and weight loss are first-line interventions for dyslipidemia.

subject: Non-HDL cholesterol
source_sentence: Non-HDL cholesterol, calculated as total cholesterol minus HDL-C, captures all atherogenic lipoproteins and is a secondary treatment target.

subject: Non-HDL cholesterol
source_sentence: Non-HDL cholesterol, calculated as total cholesterol minus HDL-C, captures all atherogenic lipoproteins and is a secondary treatment target.

subject: Bempedoic acid
source_sentence: Bempedoic acid inhibits ATP citrate lyase, an enzyme upstream of HMG-CoA reductase, and is used in patients who are statin-intolerant.

subject: Bempedoic acid
source_sentence: Bempedoic acid inhibits ATP citrate lyase, an enzyme upstream of HMG-CoA reductase, and is used in patients who are statin-intolerant.

subject: Inclisiran
source_sentence: Inclisiran is a small interfering RNA that targets PCSK9 mRNA in the liver and requires only twice-yearly dosing.
